comment: Accepted-divergence registry for the per-ENGINE xdot tracks (circo/twopi/osage/patchwork/neato/fdp/sfdp — parity-<engine>.json, written by test/corpus/engine-walk.ts). Mirrors test/corpus/accepted-divergences.json's role for the dot SVG track, but keyed simply as engine -> id -> entry (no glob/engineIn selectors needed yet: every entry here is a specific corpus id already root-caused for that one engine). Joined at report-time by test/corpus/parity-report.ts into PARITY-<engine>.md (accepted deltas pulled out of the Diverged table, counted separately in Summary) and into the cross-engine PARITY.md track row. An accepted entry is a deliberate, documented, won't-fix difference; everything non-conformant NOT listed here is an unaccepted tracked gap. Adding/removing an entry must be paired with prose in docs/known-divergences.md.

graphs-arrows.bound: 32 draw-op diffs, all on edge Z->I; unfilled_bezier[ptCount]: 8 vs 14

graphs-newarrows.bound: 32 draw-op diffs, all on edge Z->I; unfilled_bezier[ptCount]: 8 vs 14 (same graph family as graphs-arrows)

graphs-arrowsize.bound: 64 draw-op diffs on edge Z->I; first diff unfilled_bezier[0]: 289.55 vs 297.2 (position drift, not a ptCount flip, but same pre-routing mechanism)

linux.x86-arrows_dot.bound: 32 draw-op diffs, all on edge Z->I; unfilled_bezier[ptCount]: 8 vs 14 (arrows_dot variant of graphs-arrows)

macosx-arrows_dot.bound: 32 draw-op diffs, all on edge Z->I; unfilled_bezier[ptCount]: 8 vs 14 (arrows_dot variant of graphs-arrows)

nshare-arrows_dot.bound: 25 draw-op diffs on edge i->Z; first diff unfilled_bezier[0]: 265.18 vs 313.93 (position drift, not a ptCount flip, but same pre-routing mechanism)

share-newarrows.bound: 12 draw-op diffs, all on edge Z->I; unfilled_bezier[ptCount]: 8 vs 14 (newarrows variant of graphs-newarrows)

windows-newarrows.bound: 12 draw-op diffs, all on edge Z->I; unfilled_bezier[ptCount]: 8 vs 14 (newarrows variant of graphs-newarrows)

2239.bound: 1 draw-op diff; edge label _ldraw_ text[1]: 183.86 vs 173.06

1855.bound: 842 xdot draw-op diffs; whole radial layout is the exact x-axis mirror of the oracle's (y->-y, ring relabel k<->34-k), max node displacement 6.04pt. Mechanism: 1-ULP V8-vs-libm cos/sin in circleLayout setAbsolutePos, amplified by the symmetry-unstable PRISM overlap-removal equilibrium on the cocircular star. Injection A/B: feeding C's exact circleLayout pos into the port's PRISM reproduces the oracle node-for-node (3e-14).

241_0.bound: 6 draw-op diffs; edge 1->6 routed as a 14-pt multispline corridor (port) vs the native plain per-member fallback (8-pt), point deltas <0.07pt. CDT cocircular incircle tie flipped by libm sin/cos 1-ULP — sibling of the accepted circo/241_0 entry.

graphs-b29.bound: 1 draw-op diff; edge label _ldraw_ text[1]: 368.1 vs 356.1 (same knife-edge previously accepted for share-b29/windows-b29; variants swapped when polylineMidpoint gained the faithful fmadd contraction - anchor now bit-identical to C, flip is a placeLabels tie on 1-ULP-drifted surrounding objects)

linux.i386-b29.bound: 1 draw-op diff; edge label _ldraw_ text[1]: 368.1 vs 356.1 (identical mechanism to graphs-b29)

241_0.bound: 41 draw-op diffs; Delta~0.2pt on edge 1->2's routed bezier (unfilled_bezier[1]: 221.92 vs 222.12)

windows-tree.bound: 10 draw-op diffs on one fan edge (node2->node8): circo trig places node2.y a single ULP above node8.y around the symmetric value 18.0 (18.0000000000000320 vs 18.0), flipping closestSide's dyna head-port TOP/BOTTOM at the exact tie; node boxes and all other edges bit-identical.

2475_2.bound: 989 draw-op diffs confined to one 28-node 590_ component (18 nodes move, max 296.7pt; 10744/10762 nodes bit-identical). Mechanism: circo getRotation->closestNode (circpos.c:73-92) cocircular hypot tie — at the bit-identical placement offset the two candidate distances round 2 ULP apart between V8 Math.hypot and Apple libm, flipping the strict < and rotating/reflecting the sub-block ~20deg. Block tree, circle order, and all centerAngles bit-identical; CR-hypot policy previously refuted. Repro: .agent-notes/circo-2475-590-repro.dot; RCA: .agent-notes/circo-b81-2475-rca.md.

graphs-polypoly.bound: Rigid pack-cell swap of the 9000-series distorted-quad components (whole-node ±(182,338)/±2909 translations; <=24 draw-op diffs per id, no shape/routing error). Mechanism: bare transcendental cos(pi+theta) — V8 Math.cos is correctly rounded while Apple libm's cos carries a 1-ULP argument-dependent error, so |cos(pi+theta)| != |cos(theta)| only under libm; the 1-ULP size delta feeds pack GRID ceil, tips a perimeter tie, and qsort swaps two components' cells. No deterministic rewrite reproduces a non-correctly-rounded libm transcendental. osage only. Full RCA: .agent-notes/patchwork-tail-rca.md.

Mechanism: bare transcendental cos(pi+theta) — V8 Math.cos is correctly rounded while Apple libm's cos carries a 1-ULP argument-dependent error, so |cos(pi+theta)| != |cos(theta)| only under libm; the 1-ULP size delta feeds pack GRID ceil, tips a perimeter tie, and qsort swaps two components' cells. No deterministic rewrite reproduces a non-correctly-rounded libm transcendental. osage only. Full RCA: .agent-notes/patchwork-tail-rca.md.

Mechanism: bare transcendental cos(pi+theta) — V8 Math.cos is correctly rounded while Apple libm's cos carries a 1-ULP argument-dependent error, so |cos(pi+theta)| != |cos(theta)| only under libm; the 1-ULP size delta feeds pack GRID ceil, tips a perimeter tie, and qsort swaps two components' cells. No deterministic rewrite reproduces a non-correctly-rounded libm transcendental. osage only. Full RCA: .agent-notes/patchwork-tail-rca.md.
